title: Text-to-World Generation
description: User submits multi-view text prompts; the pipeline encodes them, runs diffusion-based denoising, and decodes latents into a multi-camera world video.

use_cases.name: Submit Multi-View Text Prompts
use_cases.description: User provides 6 per-camera text prompts: prompt (front), prompt_left, prompt_right, prompt_back, prompt_back_left, prompt_back_right. Single prompt or batch file supported.
use_cases.key_params: height=480, width=848, num_video_frames=57, guidance, num_steps, seed

use_cases.name: Initialize Pipeline
use_cases.description: Instantiate pipeline: load DiffusionMultiviewT2WModel via load_model_by_config(), load network weights (model.pt), load tokenizer (Cosmos-Tokenize1-CV8x8x8-720p), load T5 text encoder, set up guardrail models.

use_cases.name: Validate Prompt with Guardrail
use_cases.description: Run text safety check on input prompt before generation. Blocks generation if unsafe.
use_cases.outcome: Returns None / logs critical if guardrail blocks

use_cases.name: Encode Text Prompts
use_cases.description: Convert all 6 per-camera text strings to T5 embeddings. Returns list of (embedding, mask) tensors.

use_cases.name: Build Multi-View Video Batch
use_cases.description: Assemble data_batch dict and state_shape tuple for the multiview model, including frame_repeat_negative_condition for CFG.
use_cases.method: get_video_batch_for_multiview_model(model, prompt_embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames*n_views, frame_repeat_negative_condition) -> (data_batch, state_shape)

use_cases.name: Run Diffusion Denoising (Generate Latents)
use_cases.description: Iterative denoising loop over scheduler timesteps. Supports classifier-free guidance. Handles context-parallel (multi-GPU) splitting/merging of views.
use_cases.method: generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, seed, state_shape, n_sample, num_steps=35)
internal_flow: for t in timesteps: net(x=xt_scaled, timesteps=t, **condition) -> net_output_cond

use_cases.name: Decode Latents to Video Frames
use_cases.description: Decode diffusion output latent back to pixel space. Multiview version rearranges B C (V T) H W -> per-view segments and assembles a 2x3 grid video.
use_cases.method: DiffusionMultiviewT2WModel.decode(latent) -> rearrange(B C (V T) H W -> (B V) C T H W) -> tokenizer.decode() -> rearrange back

use_cases.name: Validate Generated Video with Guardrail
use_cases.description: Run video content safety check on generated video frames. Returns None if blocked.

use_cases.name: Save Generated Videos
use_cases.description: Save two video files: individual camera video (H x W) and multi-view grid video (2H x 3W). Also save prompts as .txt.
use_cases.method: save_video(video, fps, H, W, video_save_quality, video_save_path)

main_flow_summary: _run_model -> generate_world_from_text(model, state_shape, data_batch, guidance, steps, seed)
generate_world_from_text -> model.generate_samples_from_batch() -> diffusion loop over MultiviewGeneralDIT

multiview_specifics.grid_arrangement: 2x3 grid (order: left, front, right, back_right, back, back_left)
multiview_specifics.latent_shape: B C (V*T) H W — views interleaved in temporal dimension
multiview_specifics.context_parallel: Optional multi-GPU via megatron context parallel (split/cat along temporal dim)

important_notes: Prompt upsampler is DISABLED for multiview pipeline (enable_prompt_upsampler=False in super().__init__)
Guardrail safety checks on both input text and output video; blocks generation if triggered
Offload flags allow CPU/GPU memory management: offload_network, offload_tokenizer, offload_text_encoder_model
CFG (classifier-free guidance) uses frame_repeat_negative_condition as unconditional signal, default=10
MultiviewGeneralDIT uses MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb and MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis for view-aware positional encoding
Default output: 57 frames per view @ 480x848, fps=24
